content:
🔥 textream | Swift
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a discreet and customizable teleprompter experience for macOS users during live streams, interviews, or presentations.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time word tracking using on-device speech recognition • Classic auto-scroll with adjustable speed • Voice-activated scrolling that pauses when silent • Dynamic Island-style overlay, draggable floating window, or fullscreen on Sidecar iPad
📖 Summary: Textream is a free, open-source macOS teleprompter application designed for streamers, interviewers, and presenters. It offers real-time word tracking, classic auto-scroll, and voice-activated scrolling, displayed in a discreet overlay that is invisible to the audience.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
